# CoachFlow

> Multi-tenant WhatsApp coaching platform

SignOutButton: Provides SignOutButton.
page: Provides AnalyticsPage.
page: Provides AuditLogPage.
CohortDetailClientPage: Provides CohortDetailClientPage.
page: Provides CohortDetailPage.
CohortsClientPage: Provides CohortsClientPage.
page: Provides CohortsPage.
page: Provides JourneyDetailsPage.
JourneysClientPage: Provides JourneysClientPage.
page: Provides JourneysPage.
layout: Provides AdminLayout.
page: Provides NotificationsPage.
page: Provides DashboardPage.
page: Provides PromptsPage.
page: Provides AlertRulesPage.
TenantsClientPage: Provides TenantsClientPage.
page: Provides TenantsPage.
page: Provides UserProgressPage.
page: Provides SessionTranscriptPage.
page: Provides UsersPage.
WebhooksClientPage: Provides WebhooksClientPage.
page: Provides WebhooksPage.
layout: Provides RootLayout.
page: Provides LoginPage.
api: Provides apiFetch.
downloadCsv: Provides downloadCsv.
client: Provides createClient.
server: Provides createClient.
geminiClient: Provides generate.
coaching:
reflection:
roleplay:
scoring:
system:
analytics.test:
gdpr.test:
journeyLoader.test:
journeyVersions.test:
journeys.test:
metrics.test:
reminders.test:
scores.test:
alertRules: Provides listAlertRules, upsertAlertRule, deleteAlertRule.
analytics: Provides getCompletionRates, getStepFunnel, getScoreDistribution, getCohortCompletionRate, getCohortScoreDistribution, getCohortMemberProgress.
auditLog: Provides writeAuditLog, getAuditLog.
cohorts: Provides listCohorts, getCohort, createCohort, deleteCohort, addCohortMembers, removeCohortMember, getCohortProgress.
export: Provides getUsersExportData, getUserExportData.
gdpr: Provides eraseUser, exportUserData.
journeyLoader: Provides listJourneys, getJourney, createJourney, updateJourney, deleteJourney, getStep.
journeySteps: Provides createStep, updateStep, deleteStep, reorderSteps.
journeyVersions: Provides snapshotJourney, getActiveVersionForUser, listJourneyVersions, getActiveUserCount.
journeys: Provides ensureUserJourney, advanceUserJourney, completeUserJourney, listTemplates, cloneJourney.
metrics: Provides getActiveSessions, getStepDropOff, getStuckUsers.
notifications: Provides getNotificationConfig, getResendApiKey, upsertNotificationConfig.
reminders: Provides getIdleUsers, logReminder.
scheduler: Provides getScheduledJourneys, getEnrolledUsers, hasDeliveredToday, logDelivery.
scores: Provides saveScore, getScoresForUser, getLatestScoreForStep.
sessions: Provides startSession, endSession, logMessage, getSessionMessages, getLatestActiveSession, getSessionById, getUserSessions.
supabaseClient: Provides supabase.
tenants: Provides getTenantByPhoneNumberId, getTenantWhatsAppToken, getTenantPromptOverrides, listTenants, createTenant, getTenantById, updateTenant, setTenantWhatsAppToken, upsertTenantPrompt, deleteTenantPrompt.
users: Provides upsertUser, updateUserProgress, markOnboarded, claimMessage, getUserByNumber, searchUsers, getUserProgress.
webMessages: Provides storeOutboundWebMessage, pollAndClearWebMessages.
webhooks: Provides listWebhooks, createWebhook, deleteWebhook, getEnabledWebhooksForEvent.
contextBuilder.test:
flowRouter.test:
outputParser.test:
sessionManager.test:
sessionStore.contract.test:
contextBuilder: Provides trimHistory, transcript.
flowRouter: Provides handleInbound.
inMemorySessionStore: Defines InMemorySessionStore.
outputParser: Provides parseAIResponse.
redisSessionStore: Defines RedisSessionStore.
sessionManager: Provides configureSessionStore, getSession, createSession, updateSession, appendTurn, resetSession, deleteSession, activeSessionCount, startSessionSweeper, stopSessionSweeper.
sessionStore:
scorm.test:
scorm: Provides generateScormPackage.
index:
auth: Provides requireAuth, requireRole.
email: Provides sendEmail.
notify: Provides notifyJourneyComplete, notifyLowScore, notifyIdleUser.
deliverScheduled.test:
deliverScheduled: Provides deliverScheduledSteps.
deliver: Provides deliverEvent.
parser.test:
sender.test:
webAdapter.test:
parser: Provides parseWebhook.
sender: Provides sendMediaMessage, sendTextMessage, sendButtonMessage, sendListMessage, markAsRead.
types:
webAdapter: Defines WebAdapter.
webhook: Provides verifyWebhook, verifySignature, receiveWebhook.
whatsappAdapter: Defines WhatsAppAdapter.
index:
sessionStore.contract: Provides sessionStoreContract.
index:
index:
index:
